news.title:
Bikaji Foods completes acquisition of remaining 48.78% stake in Petunt Food Processors, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.
PFPPL operates in FMCG, focusing on food products. FY 2025 turnover was ₹52.1 Cr; acquisition cost ₹8 Cr.
news.summary:
Bikaji Foods completes acquisition of remaining 48.78% stake in Petunt Food Processors, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.
PFPPL operates in FMCG, focusing on food products. FY 2025 turnover was ₹52.1 Cr; acquisition cost ₹8 Cr.

news.title:
Bikaji Foods held analyst and investor meetings on Feb 10, 2026, in Mumbai.
Investor presentations were used; no unpublished price-sensitive info was shared.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bikaji Foods sees 14% snack sales growth, aided by GST benefits and positive campaign results.
Gross margin stable at 35%, EBITDA at 12.5%; JV expansions and investments underway.
news.summary:
Bikaji Foods sees 14% snack sales growth, aided by GST benefits and positive campaign results.
Gross margin stable at 35%, EBITDA at 12.5%; JV expansions and investments underway.

news.title: Bikaji Foods' Q3 growth appeared muted despite strong performance in key segments.

news.title:
Bikaji Foods held an earnings call on Jan 28, 2026, discussing Q3 & 9M FY25 results.
The call recording is available on Bikaji's website; no unpublished price-sensitive info was shared.

news.title: Bikaji Foods anticipates 14-16% value growth and volume growth up to 125 units.
news.summary: Bikaji Foods anticipates 14-16% value growth and volume growth up to 125 units.

news.title: Bikaji Foods aims for growth via innovation, market expansion, and stronger consumer connections.

news.title:
Bikaji Foods' Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹950M from ₹553M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 13% from 8.2%, reflecting strong operations.
news.summary:
Bikaji Foods' Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹950M from ₹553M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 13% from 8.2%, reflecting strong operations.

news.title:
Bikaji Foods approved Dec 2025 results, noted auditor's review, and 50 Cr equity infusion.
Entered joint venture in frozen bakery, approved loans of 5 Cr and 8 Cr.
news.summary:
Bikaji Foods approved Dec 2025 results, noted auditor's review, and 50 Cr equity infusion.

news.title:
Bikaji Foods schedules an Earnings Conference Call on Jan 28, 2026 at 12:00 PM IST.
Call will discuss Q3 and nine-month unaudited financial results. Details on www.bikaji.com.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bikaji Foods International has shown stable ROCE at 15%, aligning with the food industry's average.
Over the past 5 years, the company has deployed 186% more capital while maintaining consistent returns.
news.summary:
Bikaji Foods International has shown stable ROCE at 15%, aligning with the food industry's average.

news.title:
Emkay predicts subdued Q3FY26 performance for FMCG firms but expects recovery due to tailwinds.
Recovery in growth is crucial for valuations, per Emkay Global Financial Services.
news.summary:
Emkay predicts subdued Q3FY26 performance for FMCG firms but expects recovery due to tailwinds.

news.title:
India's FMCG sector anticipates 2026 growth driven by volumes, aided by stable commodity costs and revised GST rates.
A weakening rupee poses risks to margin guidance despite eased inflation and support for volume-led growth.
news.summary:
India's FMCG sector anticipates 2026 growth driven by volumes, aided by stable commodity costs and revised GST rates.

news.summary: Bikaji Foods targets mid-teen revenue growth and stable margins.

news.title:
Bikaji Foods invested ₹2.5L in its US FMCG subsidiary to boost distribution.
This move aims to accelerate growth and maintain 100% ownership.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bikaji Foods' market evaluation revised due to mixed financial signals and technical developments.
The FMCG firm's outlook now appears balanced, driven by operational performance and valuation factors.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bikaji Foods saw 15.2% revenue growth, 15.4% EBITDA, improved product mix.
Exports crossed INR 50 Cr, capacity utilization at 52%, GST cut to 5% caused disruptions.
news.summary:

news.title:
Star Air raised ₹150 crore in Series B funding to support expansion plans.
Funds were sourced from Micro Labs, Deepak Agarwal of Bikaji Foods, and others.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bikaji Foods targets double-digit growth via premiumization, product diversification, and export acceleration to GCC, UK, and North America.
The company expands beyond Tier-2 cities, adds new manufacturing lines, and focuses on rural penetration and brand investments for sustainable growth.
news.summary:
Bikaji Foods targets double-digit growth via premiumization, product diversification, and export acceleration to GCC, UK, and North America.
The company expands beyond Tier-2 cities, adds new manufacturing lines, and focuses on rural penetration and brand investments for sustainable growth.
